update_description:
✨ New Features
Must Uninstall old apk otherwise you will getting crash problem
BEFORE INSTALLING THIS NEW uPDATE PLAE MAKE BACKUP OF APP DATA BY USING SETTINGS\N* New Login Options: Sign in with YouTube Music and Spotify for seamless cloud sync 🔐
* Unified Music Integration: YouTube Music and Mussifly now work together for a smoother library experience 🎶
* Smarter Cloud Sync: Syncing is now faster, cleaner, and more reliable than ever ☁️⚡
* Logged-in Sync Only: Cloud features are now secured and available only for logged-in users 🔒
* Faster Streaming: Optimized audio stream selection for quicker buffering and playback ▶️
* Cleaner System Upgrade: Removed legacy Supabase sync for better performance and stability 🧹
* Improved App Performance: General optimizations for smoother scrolling and faster response 🚀
* Better Background Processing: Sync and playback continue more reliably in the background 🔁
* Enhanced Stability: Reduced crashes and improved overall app reliability 🛠️
* UI Refinements: Small visual tweaks for a more polished and premium feel 🎨
